section.heading: Transferability

content.p: A guarantee issued under this subchapter shall be fully and freely transferable.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 104–106, div. A, title XIII, § 1321(a)(1), Feb. 10, 1996, 110 Stat. 476, § 2540a; renumbered § 4972, Pub. L. 116–283, div. A, title XVIII, § 1873(b), (c)(1), Jan. 1, 2021, 134 Stat. 4290.)

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2021—Pub. L. 116–283 renumbered section 2540a of this title as this section.

note.heading: Effective Date of 2021 Amendment
note.p: Amendment by Pub. L. 116–283 effective Jan. 1, 2022, with additional provisions for delayed implementation and applicability of existing law, see section 1801(d) of Pub. L. 116–283, set out as a note preceding section 3001 of this title.
